# Delivery Plan

**Created:** 2026-03-16
**Total Phases:** 10

## Summary
12 features reset to TODO after Architect spec remediation (anchor nodes, visual specs, new scenarios). Work spans foundation anchors, policy enforcement, independent tools, and CDD Dashboard UI. Phased to respect dependency ordering, enable parallel execution of independent phases, and keep each session within context budget.
